response.justification: Bogdan brings 20 years of strong technical experience across diverse stacks and clearly excels at building platforms and mentoring others, meeting the baseline 15-year engineering requirement. However, the Principal Engineer—AI Strategy role demands recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms, and Bogdan's AI experience is limited to recent work (April 2025) in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks without evidence of shipped AI products, deep ML knowledge, or the director-level strategic influence expected for this position.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure across multiple languages and platforms
Proven founder and platform builder (GISCollective) with demonstrated ability to architect scalable systems and communicate technical concepts through workshops and talks
Recent involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators shows emerging AI capability aligned with current industry direction
concerns: AI expertise is recent (6 months) with no demonstrated ML products, deep learning background, or recognized contributions to AI systems
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; AI knowledge appears to be hands-on/self-taught rather than formal education or published research
Limited evidence of director-level strategic influence on product direction or customer adoption; resume emphasizes hands-on implementation over C-suite advisory or transformational leadership

key_factors.factor: 20 years technical breadth and platform-building track record
